Fields.Name: Asset ID
Fields.Description: Specify the asset ID to generate. AEG999_999-> 999999

Fields.Name: Slot Number
Fields.Description: This is the number for generation control. Only one asset can be generated in the same slot. You can control whether you want to generate duplicates or not.

Fields.Name: Create Condition Type
Fields.Description: The type of condition of occurrence

Fields.Name: Transition Source Weather
Fields.Description: Specify the transition source weather. It is referenced only when the occurrence condition is transition.

Fields.Name: Transition Destination Weather
Fields.Description: Specify the transition destination weather. It is referenced only when the occurrence condition is transition.

Fields.Name: Check Weather Elapsed Time
Fields.Description: Specify the weather to check the elapsed time.

Fields.Name: Elapsed Time
Fields.Description: Specify the elapsed time. It is referenced only when the occurrence condition is time elapsed. Real time Specify in seconds.

Fields.Name: Create Delay Time
Fields.Description: Specifies the time to delay after the generation is determined. The created slot will be in use while it is delayed. Created immediately with 0 or less.

Fields.Name: Create Probability
Fields.Description: Specifies the probability of occurrence when conditions for weather transitions or elapsed time are met.

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: Specifies the life of the generated asset. Real time Specify in seconds.

Fields.Name: Fade Time
Fields.Description: Time [seconds] used for fade-in and fade-out. No fade below 0.

Fields.Name: Enable Create Time Min
Fields.Description: Specifies a start time that can be generated [0.0 --24.0]. If you put -1 in either the start or the end, it will be treated as unlimited (can be generated in all time).

Fields.Name: Enable Create Time Max
Fields.Description: Specifies the end time that can be generated [0.0 --24.0]. If you put -1 in either the start or the end, it will be treated as unlimited (can be generated in all time).

Fields.Name: Create Point [0]
Fields.Description: Specify the generation point number. Specify the last 3 digits of the Weather Asset Generation Point in MapStudio. -1 will be invalid

Fields.Name: Create Point [1]
Fields.Description: Specify the generation point number. Specify the last 3 digits of the Weather Asset Generation Point in MapStudio. -1 will be invalid

Fields.Name: Create Point [2]
Fields.Description: Specify the generation point number. Specify the last 3 digits of the Weather Asset Generation Point in MapStudio. -1 will be invalid

Fields.Name: Create Point [3]
Fields.Description: Specify the generation point number. Specify the last 3 digits of the Weather Asset Generation Point in MapStudio. -1 will be invalid

Fields.Name: Create Asset Limit ID [0]
Fields.Description: ID for production restriction. -1: Unlimited. Generation is allowed only if it matches the generation limit ID in Map default parameter .xlsm (SEQ08921).

Fields.Name: Create Asset Limit ID [1]
Fields.Description: ID for production restriction. -1: Unlimited. Generation is allowed only if it matches the generation limit ID in Map default parameter .xlsm (SEQ08921).

Fields.Name: Create Asset Limit ID [2]
Fields.Description: ID for production restriction. -1: Unlimited. Generation is allowed only if it matches the generation limit ID in Map default parameter .xlsm (SEQ08921).

Fields.Name: Create Asset Limit ID [3]
Fields.Description: ID for production restriction. -1: Unlimited. Generation is allowed only if it matches the generation limit ID in Map default parameter .xlsm (SEQ08921).
